---
title: "01_binning"
author: "Darius HUISMAN"
date: "2026-07-14"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Introduction

## Step 3. Binning with metadata

cd to the top level of the workshop file (Workshop4_marine_genomics)
```bash
cd ~/marine-genomics/Workshop4_marine_genomics
```

Make a metabat directory
```bash
mkdir metabat
cd metabat
```

Extract depth information
```bash
cat ../flye/bbd/assembly_info.txt  | grep -v '#' | awk '{OFS="\t";print $1,$3}' > depths_bbd.txt
```

Reorder contigs based on depth
```bash
cat depths_bbd.txt | awk '{print $1}' | xargs samtools faidx ../flye/bbd/assembly.fasta > assembly_bbd_ordered.fasta
```

Run metabat
```bash
metabat2 -i assembly_bbd_ordered.fasta -a depths_bbd.txt --cvExt -o bins_bbd/metabat --seed 5
```
